message:
🌱 istio: Istio Operator Error Loops  (#1130)

* 🌱 Add istio: Istio Operator Error Loops  mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct istio namespace to istio-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-39599-istio-operator-error-loops",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Istio Operator Error Loops ",
+    "description": "Istio Operator Error Loops . This issue affects 18+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your istio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\n### Bug Description\n\nWe're upgrading our Istio cluster from v1.12.7 to v1.14.1 using Istio Operator. Istio cluster itself is fine, ingressgateway and Istio proxy are updated, but Istio Operator keep looping error and usage memory keep increased."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Istio Operator Error Loops ",
+        "description": ">  Yes our EKS clusters have had istio on for 2 years, so had several different operator configs. However, i can also repro the error on a clean KIND cluster, using the default operator profile.\n\nthe root cause of that is multi call of the following function, but I do not have any good idea about how to fix it now.\nhttps://github.com/istio/istio/blob/1aca7a67afd7b3e1d24fafb2fbfbeaf1e41534c0/operator/pkg/helmreconciler/reconciler.go#L154\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Istio Operator Error Loops  is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": ">  Yes our EKS clusters have had istio on for 2 years, so had several different operator configs. However, i can also repro the error on a clean KIND cluster, using the default operator profile.\n\nthe root cause of that is multi call of the following function, but I do not have any good idea about how to fix it now.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
